security.str_2:
Inspect the smart contract. If you can show any way the team
              could harm holders — a hidden owner, an upgrade path, a backdoor
              — the prize is yours. The bounty is real and it’s been
              sitting there since launch.
security.str_6: We removed every way we could harm you. What remains is code, published, locked, and verified by people who don't work for us.

testimonial.title: In their own words.
testimonial.quote: I've been in DeFi for four years. TurboLoop is the first project I've trusted enough to refer to my own family. The audit, the renouncement, the locked LP — they removed every excuse to not believe.
testimonial.author: Adesina O.

events.title: Daily Zoom in
events.subtitle: The community runs free Zoom sessions every single day. Drop in, ask anything, get onboarded. No pitch, no pressure, real conversations in your language.
events.sessionType1Detail: Open Zoom in 12+ languages — English, Hindi, Indonesian, Portuguese, Russian, Turkish, Spanish + more. Drop in any time.
events.sessionType2Detail: Native speakers run the calls in your language. We pay them $100/month — apply at /apply.
events.sessionType3Detail: Brand-new to DeFi? Smaller group calls walk you through wallet setup, your first deposit, and the math.
events.findYourCallDetail: Live links go up daily in our official Telegram. Pick your language, hop in.

promotions.str_2:
Inspect the smart contract. If you can prove there’s any
                way the team could harm holders, the prize is yours.
promotions.str_7:
We pay creators per view on TurboLoop content. Reels, explainers,
              livestreams — anything that brings new eyes to the ecosystem.
              Tiers based on verified view counts within 30 days of post.
promotions.str_11:
Lead a community Zoom session in your language, weekly. We
              provide the slide deck, the schedule, and onboarding support.
              You bring the energy and your local audience.
promotions.str_13: Native or fluent in your hosted language
promotions.str_14: Stablecoin payout on the 1st of each month
promotions.str_17:
When you bring a new member into the network and they make their
              first deposit, you receive a stablecoin bonus — generated by the
              protocol itself, not deducted from your referral. Bonus amount
              scales with deposit tier. See the smart contract for exact
              values, or ask a Local Presenter to walk you through it.
promotions.str_19: Three real ways to get paid.
promotions.str_20: A six-figure bounty for security researchers, a per-view payout for creators, and a monthly stipend for community leaders. All paid in stablecoins.
